In ancient times, those who sought immortality received wisdom from the Ambrosial Arbor and called themselves Celestials. They lived without restraints, and molded the flesh of themselves and others at will. They have long forgotten their original appearances after countless metamorphoses.

3011010.name: Memory Zone Meme "Allseer"
3011010.intro:
An entity infused with a certain cognition, constructed from fragments of subconsciousness in the Memory Zone.
Observation, retrospection, inspection... In the pursuit of preservation and existential understanding of the self, the memories of "seeing" and "looking" go hand-in-hand, eventually becoming an integral part of life itself.

skills.name: Glare of the Other
skills.desc: Deals minor Quantum DMG to a single target and delays the attacked target's action.

3012010.name: Memory Zone Meme "Something In The Mirror"
3012010.intro:
An entity imbued with specific cognition, formed by the accumulation of subconscious fragments in the Memory Zone.
Life forms use mirrors to understand the world and build their self-cognition. The shapeless memetic entity reflects in the mirror, leaving behind ever-shifting mirages.

skills.name: Mirror Cognition
skills.desc: Transforms into other friendly units and copies their abilities. After the transformation, this unit's Base Stats are inherited.

3012020.name: Memory Zone Meme "Heartbreaker"
3012020.intro:
An entity imbued with specific cognition, formed by the accumulation of subconscious fragments in the Memory Zone.
Life is parceled in impenetrable barriers, obstructing the intrusion of the alien. But beneath that ironclad shell, there is a region both nameless and fragile.

skills.name: Structural Deviation

skills.name: Aegis of the Unyielding
skills.desc: Enters the Safeguard state. When not Weakness Broken, reduces DMG received. Once Weakness is Broken, action will be delayed. After Weakness is Broken, increases DMG received.

3012030.name: Sombrous Sepulcher
3012030.intro:
Shattered existences serve as symbols of ultimate closure. Across the ethereal expanse, spirits cast their gaze upon the mortal realm, their eyes reflecting the etchings of oblivion and separation.
Innocent souls slumber within the Sombrous Sepulcher. Defeat the Tomb to awaken them.

skills.name: Slumber Awakening
skills.desc: After Sombrous Sepulcher receives a killing blow, dispels Morbid Dream from the corresponding target, restoring their HP and regenerating Energy.

skills.name: Temporal Departure
skills.desc: Sombrous Sepulcher will not take action.

skills.name: Eternal Continuation
skills.desc: Sombrous Sepulcher has a fixed amount of HP bars. Each time it is attacked, Weakness Broken, or receives DMG from DoT, 1 bar of HP will be depleted.

Their robust bodies are the shields of the army, and they use their stony corpus to cut off their foes, while their powerful limbs carry rations across the battlefield. They are also used as sparring partners by the soldiers of Kremnos.

When at 0 stacks, "War Armor" will be destroyed, dealing massive Imaginary DMG to this unit and delaying their action. The target that destroyed "War Armor" will regenerate Energy. After "War Armor" is destroyed, this unit will also additionally take minor Imaginary DMG when attacked. "War Armor" will be restored to maximum stacks at the end of this unit's turn.

4013010.name: Furiae Praetor
4013010.intro:
A Titankin sculpted by "Strife." They are infused with Nikador's golden ichor. They are mighty constructs capable of housing a Titan's soul. With their greatswords, they stand ready to repel the rush of the black tide or turn their blade in a countering onslaught in times of war.
Furiae Praetor will sacrifice their weaker kin, exchanging atrocity for divine punishments from the Titan.

skills.name: From Skyveil to Dawn
skills.desc: Starting from the leftmost target, uses a sweeping attack on 3 consecutive targets, dealing minor Imaginary DMG.

skills.name: From Dawn to Skyveil

skills.name: Rise from the Grave
skills.desc: Summons "Furiae Warrior."

skills.name: Polis Protector
skills.desc: Possesses a number of "War Armor" stacks, which decreases DMG taken. Loses 1 stack of "War Armor" on this unit after being attacked. When at 0 stacks, "War Armor" will be destroyed, dealing massive Imaginary DMG to this unit and delaying their action. The target that destroyed "War Armor" will regenerate Energy. After "War Armor" is destroyed, this unit will also additionally take minor Imaginary DMG when attacked. "War Armor" will be restored to maximum stacks at the end of this unit's turn.

skills.name: Dreadtide
skills.desc: Deals Physical DMG to targets in battle against "Dark Duelist."

skills.name: Desperate Deathmatch
skills.desc: All targets are split between two battlefields. Friendly and non-friendly targets cannot attack targets on a different battlefield.

skills.name: Cast Marble
skills.desc: Deals massive Physical DMG to one designated target.

skills.name: Blood-Sworn Alliance
skills.desc: Summons "Black Tide Creature."

skills.name: Fated End
skills.desc: When attacks deal DMG to targets, a portion of the reduced HP from the hit target is converted into "Corrosion." Targets affected by "Corrosion" have their DMG greatly reduced.

skills.name: Indomitable Battle
skills.desc: In each phase, when this unit is knocked down, its action is delayed, and it enters the "Repose" state. During its next action, uses "Indomitable Battle," recovers a certain amount of HP, and gets up.

4033023.name: Black Tide's Champion
4033023.intro:
A creature warped by the black tide, driven solely by an insatiable thirst for bloodshed.
Its dueling spirit, once fierce in life, has been twisted by the black tide. Wielding a massive greatsword as tall as its shoulders, it wanders aimlessly, seeking any target to destroy, offering yet more entropy to the chaos of the world.

skills.name: Cast Marble
skills.desc: Deals massive Physical DMG to one designated target.

4033024.name: Black Tide's Champion (Bug)
4033024.intro:
An erroneous materialization after the code was affected. The reference entity is Black Tide's Champion. A creature warped by the black tide, driven solely by an insatiable thirst for bloodshed.
Its dueling spirit, once fierce in life, has been twisted by the black tide. Wielding a massive greatsword as tall as its shoulders, it wanders aimlessly, seeking any target to destroy, offering yet more entropy to the chaos of the world.

skills.name: Dreadtide
skills.desc: Deals Physical DMG to one designated target and adjacent targets.

skills.name: Fatal Clash
skills.desc: Causes this unit, a designated target character, and the target character's summon to enter the "Duel" state. Uses "Spirit Breaker" after 2 turns, prioritizing the target with the most number of buffs.

skills.name: Cast Marble
skills.desc: Deals massive Physical DMG to one designated target.

skills.name: Spirit Breaker
skills.desc: Deals massive Physical DMG to all targets.

skills.name: Fated End
skills.desc: When this unit's attack deals DMG to any target, converts a portion of the hit target's reduced HP to "Corrosion".

4033030.name: Dark Sun Gryphon
4033030.intro:
Noontide Gryphon corroded by the black tide, driven solely by an insatiable thirst for bloodshed.
Even after losing Aquila's blessings, the inexhaustible energy within the black tide has turned it into something even more horrifying.

skills.name: Blacklight Emission
skills.desc: Deals Wind DMG to all targets. Converts a portion of the hit target's reduced HP to "Corrosion."

skills.name: Icon of Evernight
skills.desc: Summons an "Archer of the Dark Sun." When "Archer of the Dark Sun" is defeated, this unit will lose a portion of HP. "Archers of the Dark Sun" will not actively take action. After this unit attacks, all summoned "Archers of the Dark Sun" will perform one attack.

skills.name: Prophecy of the Eclipse
skills.desc: Enters the "The Dead Winds Cometh" state. Uses "Carol of Heat Death" in the next action.

skills.name: Carol of Heat Death
skills.desc: Deals Wind DMG to all targets. The higher a target's "Corrosion" HP is, the higher the DMG dealt. All HP under the effect of "Corrosion" will also immediately be lost.

4033031.name: Dark Sun Gryphon
4033031.intro:
Noontide Gryphon corroded by the black tide, driven solely by an insatiable thirst for bloodshed.
Even after losing Aquila's blessings, the inexhaustible energy within the black tide has turned it into something even more horrifying.

skills.name: Blacklight Emission
skills.desc: Deals Wind DMG to all targets.

4043010.name: Herta #ErrorModel
4043010.intro: A Herta puppet corrupted by a Memory Zone Meme. As it is a perfect model, it still looks exquisite and practical despite the errors consuming its parameters.

skills.name: Converted Duplication
skills.desc: Transforms into up to 5 other friendly units.

4052010.name: Servant of Tides
4052010.intro:
Daughters of the sea, their souls and flesh corroded by the sins of "Destruction," now dance and chant for the coming Dark Sun as hollow, twisted husks.
The remnant black tide flows from past ages into this world's tides—
Loyal and fair waves, bathing in the mud that overflows from your master's cup... your pristine skirts stained with madness—
You drift directionless between surges of life and death, finding no solace, no moment's peace.

skills.name: Undine's Fluttering Hem
skills.desc: Deals minor Ice DMG to all targets. When in the "Revel in Destruction" state, inflicts "Black Tide Fever" on the targets attacked, causing some DMG dealt to be taken in the form of DoT over a certain number of turns.

skills.name: River of Souls' Intolerable Solitude
skills.desc: When receiving a killing blow, deals Ice DMG to all friendly units.

skills.name: Respite By The Waters
skills.desc: Advances action after taking a certain number of attacks from Basic ATK, Skill, Ultimate, or Memosprite Skill. When in the "Revel in Destruction" state, decreases the number of attacks required to advance action.

4052011.name: Hallucinogenic Mermaid
4052011.intro: Those driven mad by the sea siren's song lose their sanity the moment they leap into the ocean, becoming the sirens' pawns.

skills.name: Undine's Fluttering Hem
skills.desc: Deals minor Ice DMG to all targets.

skills.name: River of Souls' Intolerable Solitude
skills.desc: When receiving a killing blow, deals massive Ice DMG and inflicts "Glacial Erosion" state on all friendly targets.

4052012.name: Servant of Tides
4052012.intro:
Daughters of the sea, their souls and flesh corroded by the sins of "Destruction," now dance and chant for the coming Dark Sun as hollow, twisted husks.
The remnant black tide flows from past ages into this world's tides—
Loyal and fair waves, bathing in the mud that overflows from your master's cup... your pristine skirts stained with madness—
You drift directionless between surges of life and death, finding no solace, no moment's peace.

4052020.name: Mirage Fizzle Kid
4052020.intro:
Daughters of the sea, their spirits and flesh corroded by the sins of Destruction, leaving only empty, distorted shells... In this life, they follow the Ocean's honed blade, not to be obliterated into nihility, but to become the tidal waves crashing against the Dark Sun.
The apocalyptic storm descends from the heavens, heralding the extinction of all things.
O premature Mirage Fizzle, doomed to perish before birth, exhaling countless sorrows.
The murky amniotic fluid flows, staining heaven and earth black, tainting even newborn hope.

skills.name: Rumination of Putrid Dream
skills.desc: Deals minor Quantum DMG to one designated target. If there is any "Mirage Fizzle Kid" in the "Mirage Rush" state on the field, additionally deals Quantum DMG.

skills.name: Mirage Rush
skills.desc: Enter the "Mirage Rush" state and locks on to one target. While in this state, other "Mirage Fizzle Kid" units will prioritize attacking the locked target. The state "Mirage Rush" is dispelled when this unit is Weakness Broken or receives a killing blow.

skills.name: Such Is the Fate of Bubbles
skills.desc: When receiving a killing blow, deals Quantum DMG to targets adjacent to this unit.

skills.name: Respite By The Waters
skills.desc: Advances action after taking a certain number of attacks from Basic ATK, Skill, Ultimate, or Memosprite Skill. When in the "Revel in Destruction" state, decreases the number of attacks required to advance action.

4053010.name: Lady of Crashing Waves
4053010.intro:
Daughters of the sea, their souls and flesh corroded by the sins of "Destruction," now dance and chant for the coming Dark Sun as hollow, twisted husks.
The remnant black tide flows from past ages into this world's tides—
Enchanting waves, you drank calamity for your sovereign, and your visage is adorned with wine-stained petals and shattered pearls—
You lie drunken in the frenzied abattoir, and in this grave of blood and honeyed ruin, you sing your elegy into the void.

skills.name: Intoxicating Corruption
skills.desc: Deals minor Ice DMG to one designated target and their adjacent targets.

skills.name: Honeyed Brew Sprinkled Like Stars
skills.desc: Deals minor Ice DMG to all targets and has a high chance to decrease the targets' DEF and All-Type RES.

skills.name: Melody of Invitation
skills.desc: Summons "Servant of Tides."

skills.name: Heed The Ocean's Gift
skills.desc:
Enters "Yearning for a Shared Dance" state. Uses "Embrace From the Waves" in every action. If not in "Revel in Destruction" state, friendly units that can enter the "Revel in Destruction" state will enter the "Revel in Destruction" state. This causes some DMG taken to be received in the form of DoT over a certain number of turns.
A "Revel in Destruction" countdown appears in the Action Order. When the countdown turn begins, all friendly units will have their "Revel in Destruction" state dispelled.

skills.name: Embrace From the Waves
skills.desc: Deals minor Ice DMG to all targets. When in the "Revel in Destruction" state, inflicts "Black Tide Fever" on the targets attacked, causing some DMG dealt to be taken in the form of DoT over a certain number of turns.

skills.name: Respite By The Waters
skills.desc: Advances action after taking a certain number of attacks from Basic ATK, Skill, Ultimate, or Memosprite Skill. When in the "Revel in Destruction" state, decreases the number of attacks required to advance action.

4053011.name: Elegy Siren: Insatiable Leviathan
4053011.intro: Legend has it that the plundering sea sirens can sing to lure sailors with wavering wills. Those who fall into madness will leap into the ocean and become a delicacy for the deep sea.

skills.name: Intoxicating Corruption
skills.desc: Deals minor Ice DMG to one designated target and targets adjacent to them.

skills.name: Honeyed Brew Sprinkled Like Stars
skills.desc: Deals minor Ice DMG to all targets and has a high chance to decrease the targets' DEF and All-Type RES.

skills.name: Psychedelic Elegy
skills.desc: The target can select 1 character. Then, deals Ice DMG to the selected character and causes them to enter the "Phantom Illusion" state. In "Phantom Illusion" state, the target character and their summon are Departed. At the same time, summons "Hallucinogenic Mermaid" to replace the Departed character in battle. "Hallucinogenic Mermaid" is considered as a non-friendly target.

skills.name: Heed The Ocean's Gift
skills.desc: Enters "Yearning for a Shared Dance" state and uses "Embrace From the Waves" during each action.

skills.name: Embrace From the Waves
skills.desc: Deals minor Ice DMG to all targets.

skills.name: Revel in Destruction
skills.desc: When dealing DMG, inflicts "Glacial Erosion" state on the attacked target.

skills.name: Respite By The Waters
skills.desc: After receiving a certain number of attacks from the targets, immediately uses "Psychedelic Elegy."

4053020.name: Cyclonic Swarm Mother
4053020.intro:
Daughters of the sea, their spirits and flesh corroded by the sins of Destruction, leaving only empty, distorted shells... In this life, they follow the Ocean's honed blade, not to be obliterated into nihility, but to become the tidal waves crashing against the Dark Sun.
The apocalyptic rain descends from the heavens, heralding the extinction of all things.
O Cyclonic Swarm that breeds great waves, you who have tasted the despair of your children, finally pregnant with madness.
In this burial at sea of countless stillborn souls, even tears should surge like floods, dashing hatred against the shore.

skills.name: Spurn the Abyssal Umbra
skills.desc: Deals Quantum DMG to one designated target.

skills.name: Weeping Upon the Shore
skills.desc: Deals minor Quantum DMG to one designated target and units adjacent to the target.

skills.name: Gestation of Tempest
skills.desc: Adds "Incubation" to the Action Order and applies "Breeding Frenzy" to this unit. When "Incubation" takes action, it uses "Parturition of Tides."

skills.name: Rain Is Born to Fall
skills.desc: Deals Quantum DMG to all targets.

skills.name: Parturition of Tides
skills.desc: Summons "Mirage Fizzle Kid" and applies "Maelstrom's Eye" to it. If there are "Mirage Fizzle Kids" on the field, "Cyclonic Swarm Mother" will continuously use "Rain Is Born to Fall" until all "Mirage Fizzle Kids" are defeated.

skills.name: Respite By The Waters
skills.desc: Advances action after taking a certain number of attacks from Basic ATK, Skill, Ultimate, or Memosprite Skill. When in the "Revel in Destruction" state, decreases the number of attacks required to advance action.

4062010.name: Ichor Memosprite: Pheasant
4062010.intro:
A distorted monster formed from the Garden of Recollection's memetic lifeform by the Destruction using golden ichor. It has begun to take the shape of a bird.
It is both raucous and always moves in cohesive groups, showing that even with humanity evaporated, its instinct of following the Destruction manifests in this manner.

skills.name: Hemotort Graze
skills.desc: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to one designated target.

skills.name: Hemotort Resonance
skills.desc: Causes this unit and other "Ichor Memosprites: Pheasant" on the field to enter the "Hemotort Resonance" state.

4062020.name: Ichor Memosprite: Canine
4062020.intro:
A distorted monster formed from the Garden of Recollection's memetic lifeform by the Destruction using golden ichor. It has begun to take the shape of a dog.
It is aggressive, showing that even with humanity evaporated, its instinct of following the Destruction manifests in this manner.

skills.name: Hemotort Gnaw
skills.desc: Deals Imaginary DMG to one designated target.

skills.name: Hemotort Stain
skills.desc: At the start of the battle, gains the "Hemotort Stain" state.

skills.name: Hemotort Entrustment
skills.desc: Upon taking fatal DMG, grants adjacent friendly units the "Hemotort Stain" state.

4063010.name: Ichor Memosprite: Winged Serpent
4063010.intro:
A distorted monster formed from the Garden of Recollection's memetic lifeform by the Destruction using golden ichor. It is in the rudimentary form of a flying snake, enough to intimidate its assailants.
Its twisted rationality went completely mad in the black tide, and its intense self-protecting impulse imperceptibly took on a fantastical flavor.

skills.name: Hemotort Whip
skills.desc: Deals Imaginary DMG to one designated target.

skills.name: Hemotort Spew
skills.desc: Deals Imaginary DMG to one designated target and adjacent targets.

skills.name: Menacing Warning
skills.desc: Enters the Charging state and gains "Whirl." If "Whirl" still persist during the next action, uses "Hemotort Vortex."

skills.name: Hemotort Vortex
skills.desc: Deals Imaginary DMG to all targets and converts a portion of the targets' reduced HP to "Corrosion." The higher the "Whirl" stacks, the higher the DMG. Then, loses all "Whirl" stacks.

skills.name: Torque Counter
skills.desc: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to all targets and converts a portion of the hit target's reduced HP to "Corrosion."

skills.name: Corkscrew Charge
skills.desc: After being hit by attacks from target units, if the "Whirl" stack is not 0, uses "Torque Counter" and loses 1 stack of "Whirl." During any unit's turn, each target unit can only trigger this effect once. When the "Whirl" stack reaches 0, the Charging state is dispelled.

4063011.intro:
A false projection produced by compromised codes. The referenced entity is Ichor Memosprite: Winged Serpent, a distorted monster formed from the Garden of Recollection's memetic lifeform by the Destruction using golden ichor. 5012010.name: Autonomous Wand
5012010.intro:
An Imagenesis Armament belonging to the Magical Girl Troupe. It gained mobility by carrying the beautiful wishes of young girls.
It runs on the power of song and broadcasts various transformation spells.

skills.name: Crackle Shot
skills.desc: Deals Quantum DMG to one designated target.

skills.name: Happiness Charm
skills.desc: Randomly triggers one of the following effects: Increases this unit's ATK, advances all friendly targets' actions, or has a high chance to inflict "Strong Reverberation" on all friendly units other than this unit.

skills.name: Magic of Smiles
skills.desc: When this unit is attacked for the first time, the target team gains Punchline, and this unit uses "Happiness Charm."

5012020.name: Security Doggo
5012020.intro:
An imagenae widely employed in public security and criminal investigations to assist combat units.
The Department of Aberration Defense mass-produced them using the children's book The Casefiles of Wonder Dog Lassio as a template, ensuring that every imagenated dog is loyal and possesses a burning hatred for evil.

skills.name: Arrest
skills.desc: Deals Physical DMG to one designated target.

skills.name: Guard
skills.desc: Applies "Fealty" to one designated friendly unit. When a target with "Fealty" is attacked, the Security Doggo will transfer the DMG from this attack to itself and grants the target team Punchline.

5012030.name: Aggressive Reading Material
5012030.intro:
As the saying goes, "Buying books is like a landslide; reading them is like spinning silk." Bibliophiles are always buying new volumes yet rarely crack them open.
The guilt of having "so much unread" and the self-deception that "I'll get to it someday" have woven together to create a vicious imagenae known as "Aggressive Reading Material."

skills.name: Read Or Die!
skills.desc: Deals minor Physical DMG to one designated target.

skills.name: Curse of Knowledge
skills.desc: At the start of combat, while in the "Book-Smart" state, DMG dealt increases and DMG taken decreases. After receiving Elation DMG or when the target team gains Punchline to a certain amount, the "Book-Smart" state is dispelled.

5012040.name: Assistant Graffiti: Slacker
5012040.intro:
Without external pressure, many talented creators would go their whole lives without churning out a single word. The Assistant Graffiti is an imagenae born to solve this social issue.
However, they sometimes resort to overly drastic measures, forcing creators to fight back, which has spiraled into a brand-new social issue entirely.
This particular Assistant Graffiti specializes in dealing with missed deadlines. Oh, you're a last-minute writer, huh? Well, now you don't have to write anything at all!

skills.name: Go On, Delay More!
skills.desc: Deals Ice DMG to one designated target, with a high chance to increase the DMG taken by the attacked target.

skills.name: Creative Work in Progress...
skills.desc: High Ice RES, low RES to Weakness Types.

If the DMG taken in this attack is Elation DMG, this attack will always attack a friendly unit. This effect can only trigger a maximum of 1 time while the "Strength Boost!" state persists.

The aberration born in the art school originated from the rumor of "brushes moving and painting on their own."
It congregated the self-loathing of talentless artists, their fear of school, and humanity's inherent laziness... and ultimately became what it is today.

skills.desc: Deals Physical DMG to one designated target and consumes 1 "Paint" to deal Additional DMG of the corresponding Type.

When "Paint" reaches 6 points, enters the "Color" state.
While in the "Colorless" state, Toughness will not drop below 1 point.
Increases All-Type RES, this effect is removed when Weakness is Broken and is regained when recovering from Weakness Break.

skills.name: Chromatic Threshold
skills.desc: When consuming "Paint" to deal Additional DMG to a target, if the target's Type differs from the Additional DMG Type, this Additional DMG is boosted.

skills.name: The Art of Color
skills.desc:
Upon entering the "Color" state, grants targets a set number of Punchline points based on the highest amount of a single type of "Paint". Then, according to the Type of the already obtained "Paint", gains the corresponding Type Weakness, and reduces corresponding Type RES.
At the end of the turn while in the "Color" state, if all "Paint" has been consumed, enters the "Colorless" state.

5013040.name: Daybreak Squadron: Azurewing
5013040.intro:
The pinnacle of logic and composure... or is he? He maintains a constant air of unshakeable calm, as if he's a walking encyclopedia of wisdom and lore, but at his core, he's just a sardonic loser with a talent for snark.
"My job is simply to decide what to do. As for whether it's actually possible... well, that's for you all to worry about... Holy Aha, you guys are actually doing it!?"
Cleaving the heavens! Wings spread like lightning! Warrior of the cyan welkin — Azurewing Warrior!
Darkness wanes, and dawn awakens! The Daybreak Squadron arises!

This unit's Toughness cannot be reduced. When this unit is attacked by a Quantum-Type attack, it will immediately take action. When Daybreak Squadron is in the "Daybreak Forcefield" state, after being attacked a certain number of times, it will use "Daybreak Dispersal."

skills.desc: Deals massive Quantum DMG to one designated target.

skills.name: Daybreak Dispersal

5013070.intro:
The youngest member of the group, a model citizen who perfectly embodies the school conduct code and looks to the future with starry-eyed optimism. Yet, beneath his earnestness lies a trace of shyness and self-doubt. When something piques his interest, he erupts with a manic enthusiasm only to be overcome with mortification afterward for being a nuisance.

Cleaving through despair! A blade as sharp as steel! The undying edge — Cinderborne Warrior!

8002081.intro: An interdimensional creature lost in the stars. Docile in nature. Sweet in taste. Inedible. Spends most of its life feeding and fleeing. Travelers who encounter these creatures see them as good omens.

8003012.intro:
A strange being that does not belong to this world. Nurtured in the Fragmentum brought by the Stellaron, it feeds upon this world's root structures to obtain energy. Its armor reflects the gloomy and profound starry sky.
In combat, the Ice Out of Space will freeze targets it touches.

skills.name: Chilling Lament
skills.desc: Deals minor Ice DMG to a single target. Deals extra Ice DMG to the target if the target is currently Frozen and this unit is in the Freezing Point state.

A shadow manifested by the power of a Stellaron, carrying out the Fragmentum's unceasing will to expand.

8011010.name: Baryon

In order to prevent antiparticles from dissipating and annihilating normal matter, the Antimatter Legion created two types of miniature ion traps for transportation, collectively referred to as Baryons and Antibaryons.
Baryons have basic intelligence, and can clear the path according to the commands and summons of Voidrangers on the battlefield.
